calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Instructing Successor Trustees And Funding Trust
Off Calendar Nov-10-2008 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Instructing Successor Trustees And Funding Trust
Off Calendar Nov-03-2008 Continued To Nov-10-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Burton McGovern for Frankie Mae Jefferson and Robert Hector for and with (Successor Trustees).

The Court addressed notice as to Georgia Polk Wade. Mr. McGovern stated that Ms. Polk Wade is the sister of Helen Simon, is alive, and was served, but, her name does not appear on the service list. Counsel stated that he could get a waiver from Ms. Polk Wade. The Court stated that he would either need to get a waiver or file a proof of service as to Ms. Polk Wade. The matter was continued to November 10, 2008 for status on the waiver of notice.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Jackie Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Murphy.

Petition For Order Instructing Successor Trustees And Funding Trust
Off Calendar Sep-22-2008 Continued To Nov-03-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Burton McGovern for and with Frankie Jefferson and Robert Hector (Successor Trustees).

The Court stated that there was a notice issue with regard to the four beneficiaries named in the will. Mr. McGovern argued that service was not required as they had no interest in the estate. The matter was continued to November 3, 2008 for Mr. McGovern to cure the notice issues. The Court instructed counsel to review Probate Codes 17200.1 and 850.1 and to file a supplement addressing the issues raised in the Examiner's notes.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Padilla, CSR 975. Clerk: R. Noguera/ J. Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy T. Aguerre.
